content.name: JP_ScriptLibrary
content.description:
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ # What does "_ScriptLibrary" do for you? ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ The '_ScriptLibrary' is a framework I've created that has simplified my modding process. It lets me write scripts just once and use them in multiple mods, minimizing code duplication and making updates more efficient. ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
~~~~~~~~~~~~~ # And at the end: ~~~~~~~~~~~~~ For suggestions, bug reports, feedback on translations, or if you feel something was left out in the description, please join my Discord server at https://discord.gg/UdWs6hX. Your input is crucial for the ongoing improvement of the script. Join the community, share your thoughts, and help shape its development.
Feel free to reach out and contribute!
Also available on: (Mods on Steam require the Steam version, while mods on Nexusmods necessitate the Nexusmods version) ~ GitHub: https://github.com/JanPanthera/JP_X4Mods_2023/tree/main/JP_X4Mods_2023/JP_ScriptLibrary ~ Nexus Mods: https://www.nexusmods.com/x4foundations/mods/1145/ ~ Steam: https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/filedetails/?id=2990696099
content.author: JanPanthera

text.name: JP_ScriptLibrary
text.description: Это библиотека скриптов, используемых модами JP.

text.name: JP_ScriptLibrary
text.description: Il s'agit d'une bibliothèque de scripts utilisés par les mods JP.

text.name: JP_ScriptLibrary
text.description: Esta es una biblioteca de scripts utilizada por los mods JP.

text.name: JP_ScriptLibrary
text.description: Questa è una biblioteca di script utilizzata dai mod JP.

text.name: JP_ScriptLibrary
text.description: To jest biblioteka skryptów wykorzystywanych przez modyfikacje JP.

text.name: JP_ScriptLibrary
text.description: This is a library of scripts utilized by JP mods.

text.name: JP_ScriptLibrary
text.description: To jest biblioteka skryptów wykorzystywanych przez modyfikacje JP.

text.name: JP_ScriptLibrary
text.description: Dies ist eine Bibliothek von Skripten, die von JP-Mods genutzt werden.

text.name: JP_ScriptLibrary
text.description: Esta é uma biblioteca de scripts utilizada por mods JP.

text.name: JP_ScriptLibrary
text.description: これはJPのmodによって使用されるスクリプトのライブラリーです。

text.name: JP_ScriptLibrary
text.description: 이것은 JP 모드에서 사용하는 스크립트 라이브러리입니다.

text.name: JP_ScriptLibrary
text.description: Simplified Chinese: 这是JP模组使用的脚本库。

text.name: JP_ScriptLibrary
text.description: Traditional Chinese: 這是JP模組使用的腳本庫。
